seoTitle: North Fremantle vs North Greenbushes — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Fremantle and North Greenbushes. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Fremantle vs North Greenbushes: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Fremantle and North Greenbushes.
heading: North Fremantle vs North Greenbushes — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Fremantle, Western Australia and North Greenbushes, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Fremantle has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to North Greenbushes (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Fremantle or North Greenbushes safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Fremantle has a flood risk score of 40/100, while North Greenbushes scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Fremantle scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. North Greenbushes scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Fremantle or North Greenbushes?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Fremantle has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
